hero.subtitle: Discover the most extraordinary destinations with Azure Horizon. Experience world-class service and unforgettable journeys curated just for you.

featured.title: Featured Collections
featured.subtitle: Handpicked experiences representing the pinnacle of luxury travel.

philosophy.title: The Art of the Path.
philosophy.desc: We don't just book trips — we craft experiences. Every journey is a story woven from local secrets, architectural wonders, and quiet moments that shape a lifetime of memories.
philosophy.accommodationDesc: Stay in places that tell a story.

dest.heroSubtitle: Find your next unforgettable journey from our curated collection of extraordinary places around the globe.

tailor.subtitle: Share your vision with our expert travel designers. We will curate a bespoke itinerary that transcends your expectations.
tailor.formSubtitle: Please complete the details below. A dedicated concierge will contact you within 24 hours.
tailor.whereTo: WHERE DO YOU WANT TO GO?
tailor.when: WHEN ARE YOU PLANNING TO TRAVEL?
tailor.dreamTrip: TELL US MORE ABOUT YOUR DREAM TRIP
tailor.dreamTripPlaceholder: Share your passions, interests, and any specific requirements...
tailor.submitNote: By submitting, you agree to our concierge privacy terms.
tailor.submitAlert: Form submitted successfully! Our Concierge will contact you soon.
tailor.satisfaction: Member Satisfaction for Tailor-made Journeys in 2025
tailor.signatureDesc: Each tailor-made journey is assigned a personal specialist who handles every logistical detail, from private aviation and villa procurement to exclusive access to world-renowned museums and culinary legends.

journal.title: The Journal
journal.subtitle: Dispatches from the world's most extraordinary destinations. Curated stories for the discerning traveler.
journal.article1Title: The Art of Slow Living in the Amalfi Coast
journal.article1Desc: Discover why the timeless rhythm of Southern Italy remains the ultimate blueprint for a life well-lived.
journal.article2Title: Finding Zen: The Silent Temples of Northern Kyoto
journal.article2Desc: Beyond the tourist trails lie sanctuaries where silence is the only language spoken. A journey into Japan's spiritual heart.
journal.article3Title: Architecture of the Heights: Swiss Alpine Retreats
journal.article3Desc: How modern design is redefining the traditional mountain chalet into a masterpiece of glass and cedar.
journal.article4Title: Twilight in the Serengeti: A Conservation Story
journal.article4Desc: The families working tirelessly to preserve the world's most iconic wildlife corridor for the next generation.
journal.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to our monthly editorial and receive exclusive dispatches, travel guides, and early access to new journeys.

about.heroTitle: Elevating the Art of Modern Travel.
about.heroSubtitle: We craft bespoke journeys for the discerning wanderer, where every detail is a masterpiece of exclusivity and refinement.
about.philosophyDesc1: Travel is more than just reaching a destination; it's the seamless orchestration of moments that redefine your perspective. At Azure Horizon, we curate experiences that bypass the conventional, opening doors to Michelin-star dining in the clouds and private viewings of the world's most guarded treasures.
about.philosophyDesc2: Our philosophy is rooted in the "Digital Concierge" ethos—providing effortless guidance while maintaining the human touch of traditional luxury.
about.teamSubtitle: Behind every extraordinary journey is a team of visionary architects dedicated to the pursuit of perfection.
about.julian: A pioneer in boutique luxury travel with over two decades of experience in the global hospitality sector.
about.elena: Elena spent ten years as a travel journalist before joining us to define our "Unseen World" collections.
about.marcus: Ensuring that every client request, no matter how impossible, becomes a seamless reality.
about.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Defining the new standard of modern exploration.
about.wcu2Desc: Your dedicated concierge is always one call away.
about.wcu3Desc: Transformative experiences you won't find in guidebooks.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to rewrite your travel diary?

footer.tagline: Redefining the architecture of modern travel. Global experiences, local soul.
footer.journalDesc: Subscribe to receive our monthly editorial on travel and culture.

conciergeApp.desc: Speak with our experts or use our AI for immediate, personalized itinerary assistance.
conciergeApp.header: Meet Your Personal AI Travel Concierge.
conciergeApp.subheader: Welcome to Azure Horizon. Where would you like to escape to next?
conciergeApp.disclaimer: Azure AI may hallucinate dream-like destinations. Always verify itineraries.
conciergeApp.prompt2: Luxury family trips in SE Asia
conciergeApp.prompt3: Find me a weekend coastal retreat
conciergeApp.aiGreeting: Good afternoon. I am your Azure Concierge. I can craft bespoke journeys, find hidden gems, or handle reservations. How may I assist your next departure?
conciergeApp.aiResponse: Kyoto is exquisite in the spring. I have curated a selection of private villas and exclusive garden access for you. Here is a proposed itinerary:
conciergeApp.tourDesc: Private Zen garden tours, Kaiseki dining with a local historian, and exclusive tea ceremonies.

tour_detail.day1Desc: Private airport pickup. Check-in and enjoy an intimate welcome dinner with our local guide.
tour_detail.day2Desc: Visit famous heritage sites with skip-the-line privileges. Lunch at a Michelin-starred restaurant.
tour_detail.day3Desc: Relax at a world-class Spa or enjoy free time shopping. Join the farewell gala dinner on a luxury yacht in the evening.
tour_detail.storiesSub: Hear from those who have experienced it

tour_detail.review2Text: "The local guides made a complete difference. We felt like guests in their own home."

promotions.tc1Body: Vouchers are valid for new bookings only and cannot be combined with other promotional offers unless explicitly stated. Each voucher code is for single use per member profile.
promotions.tc2Body: Flash deals are subject to limited inventory. Pricing is only guaranteed at the time of booking. Cancellations for flash deals are non-refundable.
promotions.tc3Body: Standard blackout dates apply during peak holiday seasons (Dec 20 - Jan 5) for all general promotional codes. VIP members may enjoy reduced blackout windows.
